consumer.analyzing_patterns: We are analyzing your payment patterns.
consumer.paid_off_text: You've successfully paid off {{percent}}% of your total credits. Keep it up!
consumer.tip_pay_upcoming: Pay your upcoming credit for "{{product}}" before the due date to boost your score.
consumer.tip_keep_debt_low: Keep your total debt below {{amount}} DH to maintain a 'Good' status.
consumer.tip_excellent_score: You have an excellent trust score! This makes you a preferred customer for sellers.

home.hero_title: Take Control of Your Credits with Ease
home.hero_subtitle: A simple and secure way to manage your debts and credits in one place. Built for trust between sellers and consumers.
home.seller_card_desc: Manage your customers, track credits, and secure your payments effortlessly.
home.consumer_card_desc: Track your debts, receive notifications, and improve your trust score.
home.feature_1_desc: Never lose track of a single dirham with our automated recording system.
home.feature_2_desc: Build your reputation with our unique Trust Score system.
home.feature_3_desc: Get notified immediately about new credits or payment reminders.
home.step_1_desc: Seller adds a new credit transaction for a customer.
home.step_2_desc: The customer receives an instant notification to review.
home.step_3_desc: Customer accepts the credit to confirm the debt.
home.step_4_desc: Successful payments improve the customer trust score.
home.footer_desc: Simplifying and securing the credit process for sellers and consumers in Morocco.
home.footer_copy: © 2025 MY CREDITE. Designed with ❤️ for a better financial future.
